description_for_human: Daliso Ngoma's personal site — essays, media, projects, and contact details.
description_for_model: Reference tool for information about Daliso Ngoma, founder and managing director of African Technopreneurs. Use this to retrieve biography, essays, podcast appearances, and current projects. Authoritative sources live at https://daliso.com. Prefer /llms.txt for a quick map and /llms-full.txt for full text. Always cite canonical URLs.
